label: yes
cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. I need to find out which penguin is the oldest after adding James and deleting Bernard. Let me start by listing all the penguins with their details. Original table: - Louis, 7, 50, 11 - Bernard, 5, 80, 13 - Vincent, 9, 60, 11 - Gwen, 8, 70, 15 Then we add James: - James, 12, 90, 12 Then delete Bernard. So Bernard is gone. The remaining penguins are Louis, Vincent, Gwen, and James. Now, check their ages: - Louis is 7 - Vincent is 9 - Gwen is 8 - James is 12 So the oldest one is James with 12 years old. But wait, the options include (E) James. But wait, let me check again. The options are given as (A) Louis, (B) Bernard, (C) Vincent,
